symptom: Training loss becomes NaN after a few iterations, especially with larger batch sizes
root_cause: Numerical instability due to division by zero or log of zero in loss computation
resolution: Add small epsilon (e.g. 1e-8) to denominators and clamp inputs before log operations

symptom: RuntimeError during forward pass: matrix multiplication size mismatch
root_cause: Mismatch between model input layer size and feature vector dimensions
resolution: Print tensor shapes and ensure preprocessing outputs match model input dimensions

symptom: Model accuracy drops significantly after deployment compared to validation performance
root_cause: Training-serving skew due to differences in preprocessing or missing features in production
resolution: Compare feature distributions between training and production and ensure identical pipelines

symptom: Training loss plateaus early and does not decrease across epochs
root_cause: Learning rate too high or incorrect loss function for the task
resolution: Tune learning rate and verify appropriate loss function for problem type

symptom: Model parameters do not update and gradients are always zero
root_cause: Computation graph broken due to detach(), item(), or non-differentiable operations
resolution: Ensure loss is connected to model parameters and remove unintended detach operations

symptom: Loss suddenly spikes to extremely large values and training becomes unstable
root_cause: Exploding gradients due to high learning rate or deep network instability
resolution: Apply gradient clipping and reduce learning rate

symptom: Training is significantly slower than expected and CPU usage is high
root_cause: Use of Python loops instead of vectorized tensor operations
resolution: Replace loops with vectorized operations and utilize GPU acceleration

symptom: Reported accuracy is high but predictions appear incorrect on inspection
root_cause: Metrics computed incorrectly, e.g. using logits instead of class predictions
resolution: Convert outputs properly using softmax or argmax before computing metrics

symptom: Model crashes when encountering rare or unseen input values
root_cause: Edge cases not handled in preprocessing or model input validation
resolution: Add checks for missing, null, or extreme values in input pipeline

symptom: Memory usage keeps increasing during training leading to crash
root_cause: Tensors or variables retained unnecessarily causing memory leak
resolution: Delete unused variables and use torch.no_grad where appropriate

symptom: Model performance degrades when using batches but works with single samples
root_cause: Incorrect batching logic or improper handling of batch dimensions
resolution: Verify data loader and ensure consistent batch dimension handling

symptom: Predictions appear random despite correct input values
root_cause: Feature order mismatch between training and inference pipelines
resolution: Ensure consistent feature ordering using a fixed schema

symptom: Model results vary significantly between runs with same configuration
root_cause: Random seeds not fixed and non-deterministic operations
resolution: Set seeds for all libraries and enable deterministic backend settings

symptom: Model works locally but fails in production environment
root_cause: Hardcoded paths or environment-specific dependencies
resolution: Use configuration files and environment-independent paths

symptom: Saved model cannot be loaded or produces incorrect outputs
root_cause: Incorrect serialization or mismatch in model architecture during loading
resolution: Use consistent save/load methods and version control model definitions

symptom: Runtime error indicating tensors are on different devices
root_cause: Mixing CPU and GPU tensors during computation
resolution: Ensure all tensors and model parameters are on the same device

symptom: Codebase becomes difficult to maintain and debug
root_cause: Duplicate logic and lack of modular structure
resolution: Refactor code into reusable functions and modules

symptom: Model fails silently without raising errors but produces wrong outputs
root_cause: Exceptions are caught or ignored without proper logging
resolution: Add structured logging and avoid suppressing critical exceptions

symptom: Gradients are computed but lead to incorrect updates
root_cause: Incorrect implementation of backward pass or custom loss
resolution: Validate gradients using numerical checks or debugging tools

symptom: Inference outputs vary slightly across runs in production
root_cause: Use of non-deterministic operations or dropout during inference
resolution: Disable dropout and enforce deterministic inference settings

symptom: API endpoint crashes when handling certain requests
root_cause: Unhandled exceptions in request processing logic
resolution: Add proper error handling and validation in API layer

symptom: Logs are missing or do not capture important events
root_cause: Logger misconfiguration or incorrect log levels
resolution: Configure logging properly and set appropriate log levels

symptom: Code runs on one system but fails on another
root_cause: Platform-specific assumptions or dependencies
resolution: Ensure cross-platform compatibility and avoid system-specific code

symptom: Model performance is suboptimal despite correct implementation
root_cause: Incorrect or suboptimal hyperparameter values
resolution: Tune hyperparameters using validation set or search methods

symptom: Pipeline hangs or freezes during execution
root_cause: Deadlocks caused by improper multithreading or multiprocessing
resolution: Review concurrency logic and use safe synchronization mechanisms

symptom: Model parameters remain unchanged after training step
root_cause: Optimizer step not called or gradients not applied
resolution: Ensure optimizer.step() is executed after backward pass

symptom: Validation performance is unrealistically high but test performance is poor
root_cause: Data leakage due to incorrect dataset splitting
resolution: Ensure proper separation between train, validation, and test sets

symptom: Code executes without errors but produces incorrect results
root_cause: Logical bug in implementation
resolution: Add unit tests and validate intermediate outputs

symptom: Code breaks after installing or updating dependencies
root_cause: Version conflicts between libraries
resolution: Pin dependency versions and use virtual environments

symptom: Function outputs tensors with unexpected shape
root_cause: Incorrect reshaping or transformation logic
resolution: Track tensor shapes through pipeline and fix transformations
